account__delete_confirm: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
marketing__hero__description: Ovation is a keepsake app for the people you love most. Guests scan a QR code and leave a voice or video message, a photo, or a written note. You revisit them whenever you want — for as long as you'd like.
marketing__hero__social_proof: {rating} ★ avg · read by couples on every anniversary
marketing__how__subtitle: Designed so your 82-year-old grandmother can leave a message without asking anyone for help.
marketing__how__step1_body: Pick your wedding date, add the couple names and a cover photo — that becomes your guests' welcome screen. We print a deck of elegant QR cards — one per table — and ship them in time.
marketing__how__step2_title: Guests leave a voice, video, or note
marketing__how__step2_body: They scan, pick a language, and choose how to share — 30–60 seconds of voice or video, or a written note. A photo snap can go with every message. No app to download — works on any phone made in the last 8 years.
marketing__how__step3_tag: For as long as you like
marketing__how__step3_body: After the wedding, every voice is in your inbox. Save favourites, order the Gold Book, or download a .zip of every original recording — your archive, kept on your own drive.
marketing__how__step3_quote: "Mi niña. I watched you dance tonight, and I saw your mother in every turn. She would be so proud."
marketing__sample__description: Typed wedding guest books fill up with "Congrats!!" Ovation captures the tremor in your father's voice, your best friend laughing mid-sentence, your grandmother switching to her mother tongue. Every message is auto-transcribed in the language it was spoken — and you can download every original recording any time.
marketing__sample__entry_label: Entry № 47 · Mas de la Calma, Girona
marketing__sample__quote: "Mi niña. I watched you dance tonight, and I saw your mother — God rest her — in every turn. She would be so proud. I am so proud. Live long and argue well, hija."
marketing__sample__author_role: Grandmother of the bride · Recorded in Spanish
marketing__features__lang_title: 6 languages, auto-transcribed in the language each guest spoke.
marketing__features__book_title: The Gold Book and more — letterpressed, vinyl, video montage.
marketing__features__privacy_title: Only you and your partner see anything. Ever.
marketing__features__privacy_detail: HTTPS everywhere · GDPR · EU data residency · Download your data anytime
marketing__features__kiosk_title: Turn an old iPad into a self-service message station.
marketing__features__kiosk_body: Locked fullscreen, PIN-protected exit, perfect for the welcome table.
marketing__features__planner_eyebrow: For the people who plan it
marketing__features__planner_title: A tiny QR stand for every table, a dashboard for your planner.
marketing__features__planner_body: Bulk-import your guest list, manage multiple events from one dashboard, and give your planner a co-pilot seat.
marketing__testimonial__quote: "We listened to my late father's message on our first anniversary, in the kitchen, at midnight. I don't know another product that has earned me that moment."
marketing__pricing__subtitle: Couples pay once. Professionals get a monthly plan that grows with their business.
marketing__pricing__keepsake_desc: The complete Ovation experience — every voice at your wedding, captured and online for a full year.
marketing__pricing__gold_desc: Keepsake plus the physical book — 180 letterpressed pages, bound in linen.
marketing__pricing__gold_feats__the_gold: The Gold Book (up to 180 pp, premium hardcover)
marketing__pricing__pro_starter_desc: For individual creatives booking up to 12 events per year.
marketing__pricing__pro_starter_feats__l: Letterpress QR card deck per event
marketing__pricing__pro_studio_desc: For teams managing multiple photographers and unlimited events.
marketing__faq__subtitle: Something missing? We answer every email within 4 hours — even on weekends, because weddings happen on weekends.
marketing__faq__q1: How does Ovation actually work on the wedding day?
marketing__faq__a1: We ship you a deck of letterpressed QR cards — one per table, plus a few for the bar. Guests scan with any phone, pick a language, and leave a voice or video message, a photo, or a written note. No app to download. Works on iOS, Android, and any browser from the last 8 years.
marketing__faq__q2: What about guests who are not tech-savvy, or elderly?
marketing__faq__a2: The record screen is one button. Typography is 28px minimum. Uncles, aunts and grandmothers make up ~40% of our messages — by design.
marketing__faq__q3: Can guests leave messages before the wedding?
marketing__faq__a3: Yes. Open the book any time before — guests can leave messages from the moment you create it.
marketing__faq__q4: How long do you keep the audio?
marketing__faq__a4: For your storage window — 6 months on Essential, 1 year on Keepsake and Gold Book (extendable monthly). You can download a .zip of every original recording anytime — once it's on your own drive, it's yours forever.
marketing__faq__q5: Can we get a physical book?
marketing__faq__a5: The Gold Book plan includes a linen-bound volume of up to 180 pages, letterpressed, with transcripts + favourite photos + QR codes to play back each voice. Most couples order 3 copies.
marketing__faq__a6: Only the couple accounts can see anything. Everything is served over HTTPS and stored on EU infrastructure. We never train models on your data. GDPR-compliant, EU-resident.
marketing__cta__description: Set-up takes 10 minutes. The Essential plan is free for life — your messages stay online for 6 months and are always downloadable. Upgrade anytime to keep them online longer or order the printed Gold Book.
marketing__cta__disclaimer: No credit card required · cancel anytime

product__gold_book__desc: A beautifully printed hardcover photo book with your guests' messages, photos, and transcripts.
product__hardcover__desc: A premium hardcover photo book with rigid covers, perfect for preserving your guests' messages and photos as a lasting keepsake.
product__softcover__desc: A flexible softcover photo book that captures your guests' messages and photos in a lightweight, beautifully printed format.
product__layflat__desc: A premium layflat photo book with seamless two-page spreads, designed to showcase your guests' messages and photos without interruption.
product__audio_vinyl__desc: Your favourite messages cut to a 7" vinyl record.
product__video_montage__desc: A 3-minute film of your guests' video messages.
product__digital_album__desc: Instant access to all messages, photos, and transcripts.
product__thank_you_cards__desc: Personalised cards with a printed quote from a guest message.
product__canvas_print__desc: A single message, printed large on museum-quality canvas.
product__video_montage__desc: A cinematic video montage combining your guests' audio messages with their photos.
product__digital_album__desc: A downloadable digital album with all messages and photos.
product__audio_vinyl__desc: A custom-pressed vinyl record featuring your guests' audio messages.
product__thank_you_cards__desc: Personalized thank you cards featuring photos from your guestbook.
product__canvas_print__desc: A large canvas print featuring a collage of your guests' photos.

checkout__loading__body: Securely connecting to our payment provider. This usually takes just a few seconds — please don't close this window.
checkout__cancel__body: You stepped away before completing payment, so nothing was billed. Your draft order #{id} stays available — pick it back up whenever you're ready.
keepsakes__hero__subtitle: Pick what speaks to you — we print, press, and ship. Every keepsake is built from the messages and photos your guests have already given you.
keepsakes__bundle__title: Gold Book + Thank-You Cards + Digital Album for <emph>€149</emph>
keepsakes__testimonial__1__quote: The book arrived and we both cried. Again.
keepsakes__testimonial__2__quote: Playing the vinyl at our 1-year anniversary was wild.
keepsakes__testimonial__3__quote: Every guest asked where we got the cards.
kiosk__config__what_section__desc: Pick one or more. Audio is the magic; a photo is the cherry.
kiosk__config__what__audio__desc: 60–90 seconds by default. Waveform preview while recording.
kiosk__config__what__photo__desc: Front camera, one tap. Optional — they can skip.
kiosk__config__what__video__desc: Landscape video up to 60 seconds. Off by default — big uploads.
kiosk__config__time_section__desc: Keep them tight — the best messages are short.
kiosk__config__time__return__desc: After the guest sends their message. Keeps the line moving.
kiosk__config__lockdown_section__desc: Nobody should be able to scroll your camera roll.
kiosk__config__lockdown__fullscreen__des: Hides the browser chrome. Requires passcode to exit when set.
kiosk__config__lockdown__guided__desc: iPhone: Settings → Accessibility → Guided Access. Android: pin-a-screen in task switcher.
kiosk__config__lockdown__pin__desc: Four digits. So a curious guest can't get out.
kiosk__config__welcome_section__desc: What guests see before they tap record.
kiosk__config__welcome__note_placeholder: Hola! Bienvenue. Leave us a message — a story, a song, a bad dance move. We'll cherish it.
kiosk__config__welcome__photo__desc: Faded into the background behind your names.
kiosk__config__welcome__lang_picker__des: Let guests switch before recording. We detect their device language first.
kiosk__config__welcome__chime__desc: A soft chime plays when a guest taps record. Friendly and clear.
kiosk__config__languages_section__desc: The main one is shown first. Add any your guests speak.
kiosk__config__offline_section__desc: Venue WiFi dies. We planned for it.
kiosk__config__offline__store__desc: Messages save to the device and sync the moment WiFi is back.
kiosk__config__offline__storage__desc: Roughly 200 audio messages at 90s each. You'll be fine.
kiosk__config__offline__notify__title: Notify us if sync falls behind
kiosk__config__offline__notify__desc: Email and push, if more than 20 messages are queued.
help__hero__subtitle: Quick answers, step-by-step guides, and a way to reach a human when you need one.
help__resource__guide__desc: Everything from setup to keepsakes, in plain English.
help__resource__videos__desc: Watch short tutorials for the trickiest parts.
help__resource__chat__desc: Mon–Fri, 9–18 CET. Average reply under 5 minutes.
help__resource__email__desc: We reply within 24 hours, weekends included.
help__faq__subtitle: Tap a question to expand the answer.
help__faq__getting_started__a: Create your event from the home page, set your couple names and wedding date, then share the link or QR code with guests. The kiosk and direct-link flows both work out of the box.
help__faq__kiosk_mode__a: Open Quick links → Kiosk on your tablet, hit Start kiosk on this device, and the screen locks into a guest-friendly welcome view. Set a 4-digit PIN in Lockdown to prevent guests from exiting.
help__faq__qr_code__q: Where do I find the QR code?
help__faq__qr_code__a: Quick links → QR code. Download as PNG or SVG, print it, and place it next to your kiosk or on table cards.
help__faq__languages__q: Can guests submit in different languages?
help__faq__languages__a: Yes. Add languages on the kiosk page. Guests can switch from the welcome screen if you enable the language picker.
help__faq__messages_storage__a: Storage depends on your plan. You'll see the expiry date on each event. Renew or upgrade from Settings to extend it.
help__faq__keepsakes__a: Production starts when you confirm the order. Lead times vary per product (3–45 days) and are shown on each keepsake page.
help__faq__billing__q: How do I change billing or cancel?
help__faq__billing__a: Settings → Account → Billing. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime. Refunds follow our 14-day policy.
help__contact__body: If you can't find what you need, drop us a line. Real people, real answers — no chatbot maze.
kiosk__exit__hint: Enter the 4-digit PIN to leave kiosk mode.
settings__privacy__subtitle: Control who can see your book, who can leave messages, and who can see them. Defaults are private — change only what you want to open up.
settings__privacy__visibility__private__: Only you, your partner, and invited guests can see anything.
settings__privacy__visibility__unlisted_: Anyone with the link can view — but it won't appear in search.
settings__privacy__visibility__public__d: Discoverable in Ovation's gallery of wedding books (curated, opt-in).
settings__privacy__senders__invited__des: Only people who scanned a QR card you sent, or used your invite link.
settings__privacy__senders__anyone__desc: Useful if you're sharing over WhatsApp or Instagram.
settings__privacy__senders__signin__desc: Guests enter their email before leaving a message. Catches pranksters.
settings__privacy__review__before__desc: Every message waits in your queue until you approve it. Turn off for a more live feel.
settings__privacy__review__autopublish__: Messages from guests you tagged as 'family' skip the queue.
settings__privacy__what_guests__desc: Controls what a guest sees when they visit your public link.
settings__privacy__what_guests__count__d: A "142 messages from 88 guests" stat on the welcome screen.
settings__privacy__what_guests__others__: Lets guests browse what others left (after yours is recorded).
settings__privacy__what_guests__contribu: A read-only list. Only visible to co-owners by default.
settings__privacy__ai__transcribe__desc: We use on-device speech recognition. Transcripts never leave your book.
settings__privacy__ai__guest_see__desc: Guests can correct their own transcript before submitting.
settings__privacy__ai__suggestions__desc: Claude can propose thank-you notes and book layouts. Off means pure manual.
settings__data__all_events__desc: Pro tools — one workbook with every event you manage, one sheet per event.
settings__data__all_events__row_desc: Includes {count} events. Guests, contribution counts and media flags per attendee.
settings__data__per_event__desc: Everything below applies to the selected event.
settings__data__subtitle: Your messages belong to you. Download everything anytime — audio, transcripts, photos, metadata.
settings__data__hero__body: All messages, hours of audio, photos, full JSON metadata. Arrives in your email within 10 minutes.
settings__data__individual__pdf__desc: Your current Gold Book draft · print-ready 300 dpi
settings__data__individual__guests__desc: CSV with contact info + contribution status
settings__data__past__expiry_note: Download links expire after 7 days for your security.
settings__data__rights__desc: Under GDPR & CCPA. For requests on behalf of a deceased partner, contact support.
settings__data__rights__report__desc: A PDF summary of everything we know about you and your book. Takes up to 72 hours.
settings__data__rights__optout__title: Ask us to stop using your data for service improvement
settings__data__rights__optout__desc: We use anonymized patterns to tune transcription and layout. Opt out any time.
marketing__showpiece__quote: “You’ve built something so beautiful together — watching you both today, I kept thinking how lucky I am to call you my dearest friend.”
auth__signup__countdown__hint: Plenty of time to gather voices.
auth__signin__welcome__body_voices_full: Gathering <voices>{voicesCount} new voices</voices>, <photos>{photosCount} new photos</photos>, and queueing them the way you left them.
auth__signin__twofactor__body_full: We sent a 6-digit code to your phone. It expires in <timer>4:52</timer>.
orders__page__empty_body: Your keepsakes and prints will appear here once you place your first order.
qr_code__share__email_subject: A voice message for our wedding book
qr_code__share__suggested_a: “Hi! Would you record a short voice message for our wedding book? Scan the code or tap —
qr_code__order__body: Hand-printed in Lisbon. Ships to Girona in 5–7 days.
qr_cards_order__qty__body: One card per guest is our rule of thumb. Order 10% extra for replacements and save-the-dates.
qr_cards_order__design__body: Your cover, date, and URL are pulled from your book — change them below and the proof updates live.
qr_cards_order__design__confirm_proof: I've double-checked the names, date, and URL. I understand the proof is final once I approve.
qr_cards_order__shipping__phone_help: We only use this if the courier needs to reach you.
qr_cards_order__payment__save_card: Save this card for future orders
qr_cards_order__payment__stripe_note: Your payment is processed by Stripe. Ovation never stores your card number.
qr_cards_order__confirm__body: We've sent a receipt to your email.
photos__filter__pair_body: {count} photos still unmatched — tap to review suggestions.
guests__nudge__title: Nudge {count} guests who haven’t recorded yet
guests__nudge__body: We’ll send a warm one-liner with your link. You can preview and edit before anything goes out. WhatsApp works best — 3× the response rate of email.
guests__nudge__preview_body: “Hi Renée — Lena & Tomás here. The book is closing soon; would love a quick voice note. 30 seconds is plenty. {host}/lena-tomas”
guests__thankyou__body: Pre-addressed postcards with each guest’s own photo and a quote they said. We print, stamp, and ship.
link_settings__subtitle: Control what guests can submit through your link, QR code, and kiosk.
link_settings__empty__body: Create an event to manage link settings.
link_settings__types__desc: Choose which formats guests can send.
qr_code__link_settings_card__desc: Manage submission types, recording length, and link status from a single page.
kiosk__config__link_redirect__desc: What guests can submit and recording length now live on the link settings page — shared by your link, QR code, and kiosk.
auth__social__error_default: Couldn’t start sign-in. Please try again.
guests__select_all: Select all guests on this page
guests__directory__empty_body: No guests yet — once messages start arriving, contributors will show up here.
guests__directory__empty_hint: Once messages start arriving, contributors will show up here.
keepsakes__design__fallback__headline: A piece of the day, kept.
keepsakes__design__gold_book__tagline: A printed hardcover with every guest message, photo, and transcript.
keepsakes__design__softcover__tagline: Every message in a flexible softcover — quicker to print, easier to pass around.
keepsakes__design__layflat__tagline: Lay-flat binding so a single quote can stretch the full width of the page.
keepsakes__design__video_montage__headli: Their words. Their faces. One reel.
keepsakes__design__video_montage__taglin: A 3-minute film stitched from every voice and photo your guests left.
keepsakes__design__audio_vinyl__headline: Side A: speeches. Side B: chaos.
keepsakes__design__audio_vinyl__tagline: A real 12" record from your guest audio. Side A: speeches. Side B: chaos.
keepsakes__design__digital_album__taglin: A living album guests can revisit. Share a single link — plays on any device.
keepsakes__design__thank_you_cards__head: Say thanks — in their own photo.
keepsakes__design__thank_you_cards__tagl: Each card features the guest’s own photo and a snippet of what they said.
keepsakes__design__canvas_print__tagline: One favourite quote, typeset on archival canvas. Ready to hang.
marketing__gold_book__description: The Gold Book is a premium printed record of every message your guests left — transcribed and laid out beautifully. Each spread includes a QR code that plays the original audio.
marketing__gold_book__feature1_body: Enough room for every voice, with room to breathe.
marketing__gold_book__feature2_body: Feels like the heirloom it will become.
marketing__gold_book__feature3_body: Scan any page to hear the voice behind the words.
marketing__gold_book__feature4_body: Every message auto-transcribed in the language it was spoken.
marketing__gold_book__ships: Ships in 2–3 weeks · Free EU delivery
marketing__changelog__description: Every update, every improvement — shipped with care.
marketing__for_planners__description: Wedding planners who partner with Ovation give every couple a voice-first guest book — no hardware, no app downloads, no friction. You focus on the day. We capture the words.
marketing__for_planners__benefit1_body: Get invited into your couples' Ovation accounts with full event-management access — guests, QR cards, orders, and messages.
marketing__for_planners__benefit2_body: Manage QR codes, guestlinks, and orders across all your events in one place.
marketing__for_planners__benefit3_body: Offer Ovation under your own brand with a custom domain and logo.
marketing__for_planners__benefit4_body: Dedicated onboarding and a direct line for day-of questions.
marketing__about__description: Ovation started with a voice note. One of our founders recorded a message at a friend's wedding, watched it get lost in a WhatsApp group, and thought: this deserved better. We built Ovation to make sure every voice finds its way home.
marketing__about__mission: To preserve the voices that matter most — not as text, not as photos, but as the sound of someone saying I love you in their own voice, in their own language, in the moment they meant it.
marketing__about__team_description: We are a small, international team who have attended more weddings than we can count and cried at most of them.
marketing__careers__description: We are a small team building something that matters. We work remotely across Europe, ship often, and believe deeply that the words people say at weddings deserve to outlast the flowers.
marketing__careers__value1_body: We have no fixed office. Our team is spread across Peja and Amsterdam.
marketing__careers__value2_body: We move fast and trust each other. No bureaucracy, no endless reviews.
marketing__careers__value3_body: Every pixel, every line of copy, every feature gets the attention it deserves.
marketing__careers__value4_body: We build things that matter to real people on the most important days of their lives.
marketing__careers__no_openings: No open positions right now — but we are always interested in hearing from exceptional people.
marketing__sustainability__eyebrow: What we know about our footprint
marketing__sustainability__description: We don't make sustainability claims we can't verify. Here is what we do know about how your keepsakes get made and shipped.
marketing__sustainability__commitment1_b: Books are produced through a European print network that ships from the facility closest to your address — fewer kilometres per parcel.
marketing__sustainability__commitment2_b: Our print partner is Amsterdam-based with production across Europe, so most orders never cross an ocean.
marketing__sustainability__commitment3_b: No inventory, no waste. Every book is printed only when ordered.
marketing__sustainability__commitment4_b: We build for heirlooms, not for landfill. Quality covers, archival-grade paper options, lay-flat binding.
marketing__sustainability__footer_note: We are not perfect. But we are honest about where we are and serious about where we are going.
marketing__contact__title: We would love to hear from you.
marketing__contact__description: Questions, feedback, press, partnerships — reach us at the address below and we will reply within one business day.
marketing__changelog__entry1_description: Kiosk mode. Set up a tablet at your venue and let guests record without needing a QR code link.
marketing__changelog__entry2_description: Gold Book redesign. New lay-flat binding, updated typography, and 12 new cover options in linen and vegan leather.
marketing__changelog__entry3_description: Multi-language transcription. Every voice message is now automatically transcribed in the language it was spoken, with the original audio preserved.
marketing__changelog__entry4_description: Ovation launches. Voice messages, photo uploads, and the first Gold Books ship to couples in Spain and the Netherlands.
marketing__keepsakes__description: From printed Gold Books to vinyl records and canvas prints — every format designed to make your guests' words last a lifetime.
marketing__keepsakes__product2_descripti: Your favourite messages cut to a 7" vinyl record.
marketing__keepsakes__product3_descripti: A 3-minute film of your guests' video messages.
marketing__keepsakes__product4_descripti: Instant access to all messages, photos, and transcripts.
marketing__keepsakes__product5_descripti: Personalised cards with a printed quote from a guest message.
marketing__keepsakes__product6_descripti: A single message, printed large on museum-quality canvas.
marketing__keepsakes__shipping_note: All physical products ship in 2–3 weeks. Free delivery within the EU.
marketing__privacy__intro_body: Ovation is a wedding guest-message platform — couples collect voice notes, video, photos and written messages from their guests. We operate from Peja, Kosovo. This notice explains, in plain language, what data we collect, how we use it, and how to reach us or delete your account at any time.
marketing__privacy__collect_body: From you (the couple): your name, email address, password (hashed), and the event details you enter — names, wedding date, cover photo, slug. From your guests: the name they type in, plus any voice recording, video, written note, or photo they choose to leave. Automatically: basic technical data such as IP address, browser, and the pages you visit, used to operate the service and prevent abuse.
marketing__privacy__use_body: Only to run the service: storing and showing you guest messages, transcribing audio, sending you account emails, processing orders, and keeping the site secure. We do not sell your data, do not show ads, and do not train AI models on your data.
marketing__privacy__share_body: We rely on a small set of third-party services to operate. Each only sees what's needed to do its job. The categories include: file storage and database hosting, transactional email delivery, audio transcription, payment processing, print-on-demand fulfilment for physical keepsakes, and basic analytics and error tracking. We don't share data with anyone else, and we don't sell data to third parties.
marketing__privacy__rights_heading: Your rights and how to delete your data
marketing__privacy__rights_body: You can download all your data (audio, photos, transcripts, guest list) anytime from Settings → Data. You can delete your account anytime from Settings — that triggers a hard delete of your event, messages, and files within 30 days. For anything else, email <link>{email}</link> and we'll respond as fast as we can.
marketing__cookies__intro_body: We use cookies only to make the site work — to keep you signed in, to remember your language, and to protect form submissions from abuse. We don't use third-party advertising cookies and we don't sell data to anyone.
marketing__cookies__essential_body: A session cookie that keeps you signed in, a CSRF token cookie that protects form submissions, and a small preference cookie for your selected language. These are strictly necessary — disabling them will break sign-in.
marketing__cookies__third_party_body: Our payment pages and our anti-bot challenge may set their own cookies when you interact with them. They're scoped to those specific flows. We use lightweight analytics and error tracking — both are configured to avoid setting tracking cookies on you.
marketing__cookies__contact_body: Email <link>{email}</link> with any cookie or privacy question and we'll get back to you.
settings__billing__dre_cta_body: Your event data is deleted on {date} unless you keep it with Data Retention Extension. We'll email you before then with a checkout link. €20/month, billed only after your current storage expires.
settings__billing__dre_pending_body: DRE activation pending. We'll email you before {date} with a checkout link. If you don't complete checkout, your event data will be deleted on {date}.
plans__dre__description: Keep your event data live past its base-plan expiry. Billed monthly.
dre_modal__error: Couldn't load plan. Please try again.
storage_expired_modal__body: Your event media will be permanently deleted in {days} days. Activate Data Retention Extension now to keep everything safe.
storage_expired_modal__error_generic: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
plan_status__free_description: Your link is live. Upgrade for longer storage and more guests.
app__plan__dre_upsell_description: Add Data Retention Extension to keep your event data after your storage expires.
upgrade_modal__storage__body: You've used up your free 1GB of storage. Upgrade your plan to keep uploading photos, videos, and audio messages.
upgrade_modal__messages__body: Your event has hit the 50-message free limit. Upgrade your plan to keep collecting messages from your guests.
coming_soon__description: Ovation is a keepsake app for the people you love most. Guests scan a QR code and leave a voice message and photo. You open one every morning — for as long as you'd like.
coming_soon__feature_1: Guests scan a QR code — no app to download
coming_soon__feature_2: One message every morning for 30 days
coming_soon__waitlist__email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
coming_soon__waitlist__success_body: We'll email you when we launch.
coming_soon__waitlist__error: Something went wrong — please try again.
keepsakes__media_preview__description: Full-size preview of the selected media item.
cart__addresses__description: Each product can ship to its own address. Edit any below.
cart__addresses__default_subtitle: Used for any product without its own address
cart__addresses__incomplete: Please complete the shipping address for every product.
